description: Sentry has not reported any NEW issues in the last 49+ hours (since 2026-03-07 15:38:11 UTC). This is a potential monitoring blind spot during active development.

issues.title: IntegrityError: null value in column access_token_encrypted violates not-null constraint
ProgrammingError: relation users does not exist

routing_activity.note: Health monitor is detecting and routing the 3 old issues, but no NEW issues are appearing

memory_event_analysis.note: Heavy routing activity on 2026-03-06, then complete silence

H1_application_not_running.description: Flask backend/Celery workers are not running, so no new errors can occur

H2_sdk_not_capturing.description: Sentry SDK is initialized but not capturing exceptions
evidence_needed: SDK integration status in running app

H3_network_egress_blocked.description: Application is running but Sentry events cannot reach Sentry.io
evidence_needed: Network connectivity test from application container

H4_genuinely_stable.description: Application is running perfectly with no errors
H4_genuinely_stable.note: Unlikely given active development and 3 pre-existing unresolved issues

recommended_investigation_steps: 1. Check if Docker containers are running (docker ps | findstr backend|celery|nginx)
2. Check Flask application logs for recent activity
3. Test Sentry event capture manually (import sentry_sdk; sentry_sdk.capture_message('test'))
4. Check Celery worker logs for task execution
6. Check if development environment has been started recently
7. Review git commits/deployments around 2026-03-07 that might have stopped services

impact_assessment.user_impact: Unknown - cannot determine if application is healthy or broken
impact_assessment.observability_impact: CRITICAL - blind to production errors for 49+ hours
impact_assessment.mttr_risk: HIGH - if application is broken, MTTR clock started 49+ hours ago
impact_assessment.phase_15_1_goal_impact: Autonomous intake and auto-resolution cannot function without error ingestion

immediate: Verify application runtime status (containers, processes, health checks)

commander_routing.quality_gate: Root cause identified with confidence >= 0.7 AND mitigation plan deployed
